title: Find the Substring With Maximum Cost
titleCn: 找到最大开销的子字符串

testcases.input: s = "adaa", chars = "d", vals = [-1000] Output: 2 Explanation: The value of the characters "a" and "d" is 1 and -1000 respectively. The substring with the maximum cost is "aa" and its cost is 1 + 1 = 2. It can be proven that 2 is the maximum cost.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The value of the characters "a" and "d" is 1 and -1000 respectively. The substring with the maximum cost is "aa" and its cost is 1 + 1 = 2. It can be proven that 2 is the maximum cost.

testcases.input: s = "abc", chars = "abc", vals = [-1,-1,-1] Output: 0 Explanation: The value of the characters "a", "b" and "c" is -1, -1, and -1 respectively. The substring with the maximum cost is the empty substring "" and its cost is 0. It can be proven that 0 is the maximum cost.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The value of the characters "a", "b" and "c" is -1, -1, and -1 respectively. The substring with the maximum cost is the empty substring "" and its cost is 0. It can be proven that 0 is the maximum cost.
